courseTitle: Level Design, Spaces, and Encounter Craft
title: Environmental Story Game
genericDescription: Communicate narrative through arrangement; use props and spatial sequence; avoid exposition as the main delivery method.
specificDescription: Build an explorable space that tells a story through environment, objects, locked/unlocked paths, and player discovery. Text is allowed but cannot carry more than half of the meaning.
gradingRubric: 30 pts environmental storytelling; 20 pts spatial sequencing; 20 pts interaction design; 15 pts interpretive clarity; 15 pts reflection.
